headline: Xcel Energy Faces FERC Dam Safety Reviews And Valuation Questions
summary: Xcel Energy (NasdaqGS:XEL) has received multiple compliance requests from the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission related to dam safety and engineering standards at several hydroelectric projects. FERC has asked for additional seismic analysis for the Stagecoach Dam, information on safety measures for geotextile filter fabric at another dam, and details on spillway capacity at the Gile Reservoir. These reviews focus on whether existing infrastructure and procedures align with current...
